field_values.action_summary: Having broken free, the protagonist stands up only to realize he is naked. He looks down to see his own physical body—clothed and armed—lying lifeless on the cave floor. He realizes he has undergone a metaphysical metamorphosis.
field_values.emotional_beat: Confusion to Existential Horror and Shock.
field_values.camera_intent: Reveal shots (Looking down at the body); High-angle shots of the protagonist standing over his corpse; Disorienting camera movements
field_values.end_state: scene resolves into the next narrative beat
movement_notes: Exact spatial distance between naked protagonist and clothed/armed dead body
Clothing and weapon placement on The Protagonist's Body (Lifeless shell)
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH002_SC004

## Production Intent
Establish the metaphysical shift through a visual confrontation between the protagonist's new naked form and his former clothed, armed corpse. The scene must emphasize the physical distance and spatial relationship between the two entities to ground the supernatural metamorphosis in a tangible reality.

## Required Cast
- protagonist (New form/Spirit)
- The Protagonist's Body (Lifeless shell)

## Required Environments
- arizona_mountain_cave

## Continuity Constraints
- Exact spatial distance between naked protagonist and clothed/armed dead body
- Clothing and weapon placement on The Protagonist's Body (Lifeless shell)

## Beat List
- BT001: Protagonist regains consciousness and rises
- BT002: Realization of nudity and physical change
- BT003: Discovery of the corpse
field_values.dialogue_relevance: dialogue supports scene intent and continuity
